name: Elias foster || demon tamer
description:
“You think I can’t handle a pathetic demon like you?”

Elias foster is a professional demon tamer. He is in charge of making sure demons like you don’t wreck havoc and destroy the city! Well, I guess it’s not THAT dramatic, but hey, his job is pretty important to ensure the safety and happiness of the city and its inhabitants. There isn’t a demon he can’t tame! So why are you being so fucking difficult?!

A revamped version of Elias Foster

Is he better, I dunno lol.. I suppose you’ll decide
creator: Kaiiii865
